name: Daytona State
degreeTitle: A.A. — Health & Wellness Track (transfer to Exercise Science / Athletic Training)
acuAlignNote: Daytona State's A.A. — Health & Wellness Track is a general transfer degree (not a dedicated Exercise Science A.S.). The School of Health & Wellness provides relevant coursework: Human Anatomy & Physiology (confirmed, dedicated A&P library guide) → ANAT100; Biology (BSC1086C confirmed) → BIOL125; Exercise Physiology / Health Science content → EXSC225; Kinesiology / Movement content via PET 2084 Personal Health & Wellness → EXSC224. Also includes PET 2621/2622 Athletic Training (principles + care & prevention of injuries) and HUN 1201/1270 Human Nutrition / Sports Nutrition. The Florida statewide A.A. degree guarantees junior-year entry into Florida 4-year universities (USF, UCF, FIU, FSU) where Exercise Science degrees can be completed. WES evaluation required. Confirm specific course equivalences with DSC academic advisor — coverage may be higher once specific course catalog is reviewed.
soccerLevel: NJCAA Division I — 2025 National Championship Runners-Up, Top-5 D1 Transfer Feeder

fin.internationalNote: Daytona State out-of-state/international COA is ~$16k/yr — affordable Florida JUCO. Athletic scholarship can cover 40-65% of COA. Florida Bright Futures scholarship not available to international students but athletic grants are competitive. 2-year total before aid: ~$32k. After realistic athletic package: $11-20k total.

coach.name: Joe Avallone
coach.title: Head Coach
coach.profile: Joe Avallone was named Head Coach at Daytona State in 2023, bringing over 30 years of coaching experience. He co-founded and served as Director of Coaching at Florida Kraze/Krush Academy — one of Florida's premier youth academies. In just his second full season, Avallone led the Falcons to the 2025 NJCAA DI National Championship final, losing 1-0 to Indian Hills CC. Assistant Jonathan Lopez handles player recruitment. The entire 2025-26 MF roster (7 players) clears before Olivier arrives in August 2027 — ask Avallone: 'How many central midfielders are in your 2026 class?'

gpa.note: Daytona State has open enrollment — zero GPA requirement. Florida JUCO pathway gives access to the Florida state university transfer system.

rec: 2025 NJCAA DI National Championship runners-up (lost 1-0 to Indian Hills in the final). Top-5 JUCO D1 transfer feeder nationally. Daytona Beach is warm Florida coastal living — beach, motorsport, tourism city. Best lifestyle-to-performance ratio in the JUCO section. Florida transfer pathway to USF, FAU, FIU, UCF, and beyond.

facilityDetails.stadium: DSC Athletic Complex — natural grass facility for NJCAA soccer. Florida climate enables year-round outdoor play.
facilityDetails.trainingFields: On-campus training fields. Daytona Beach warm Florida climate allows outdoor training 12 months per year.
facilityDetails.strengthConditioning: DSC Athletic weight room — functional JUCO standard with free weights and conditioning equipment.
facilityDetails.sportsScience: Basic JUCO level. High-quality coaching that delivered a 2025 NJCAA DI National Championship final appearance.
facilityDetails.sportsMed: DSC Athletic Trainer on staff. AdventHealth Daytona Beach and Halifax Health provide local sports medicine access. Florida has excellent sports medicine infrastructure.
facilityDetails.academicLabs: Associate degree science prerequisites: biology, chemistry, anatomy. Florida articulation agreements with state university system (USF, UCF, FIU, FSU, UF) make transfer into Exercise Science programs straightforward.
facilityDetails.extras: Daytona Beach is a motorsport capital (Daytona 500 at Daytona International Speedway), 23 miles of Atlantic beach, Daytona Tortugas baseball (minor league). Orlando is 60 miles south (Disney, Universal, MLS Orlando City). Miami is 3 hours south. St. Augustine is 60 miles north. Perfect warm Florida lifestyle year-round.
facilityDetails.note: DSC is arguably the best lifestyle JUCO in the guide — beach Florida living with a top-5 D1 transfer record and a 2025 national championship final appearance. For Olivier (Sydney background, warm/coastal preference), Daytona Beach is the closest US analog to Australian coastal city culture.

culture.vibe: Daytona State College is a community college on Florida's Atlantic coast, home of the Daytona 500. The Falcons soccer program competes at the highest JUCO level — 2025 NJCAA DI National Championship finalists. International roster, beach culture, warm year-round. A genuine lifestyle destination that also happens to be a top-5 D1 transfer feeder.
culture.thingsToDo: 23 miles of Atlantic Ocean beach, Daytona International Speedway, Daytona Tortugas minor league baseball, Tomoka State Park, Marine Science Center, Ponce Inlet Lighthouse. Day trips: Orlando (60 min), St. Augustine (60 min), Cape Canaveral (45 min). Beach, motorsport, space coast — unique American experience.
culture.socialScene: Beach and motorsport city culture with a strong international student community. DSC soccer squad is competitive and internationally diverse. Florida community college students are a mix of local and international students focused on transfer. Laid-back beach culture with serious athletic goals.
culture.olivierMatch: ★★★★ Daytona Beach is the best lifestyle JUCO match for Olivier — warm, coastal, city infrastructure, beach culture. The closest US equivalent to Sydney's warm coastal city vibe. 2025 national championship finalist program adds performance credibility to what is already the best lifestyle JUCO option.
culture.lifestyleTags: Beach, warm, coastal, city, Florida, motorsport, transfer pipeline
